'''Adarakh''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] who served as the bodyguard of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] alongside [[Meewalh]], following the [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Duro]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==Biography==
When [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] was [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|attacked]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], Adarakh and Meewalh escorted Leia, [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Ben Skywalker]] to [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]. However, they were approached by the treacherous [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Viqi Shesh]], whose disguise fooled even Adarakh. [[YVH 1-507A]] revealed her true identity, causing Shesh to attack the Solo party. She stabbed Adarakh in the [[Heart/Legends|heart]] with a [[Vibro-shiv/Legends|vibro-shiv]], [[Death/Legends|killing]] him instantly. Adarakh's death gave the Solos a chance to escape the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].
